slots.bottom: Lender: 'Just need one more bank statement and a letter explaining a $43 Venmo from 2022.'

calibration_notes: Time specificity (noon, 11:47am — 13 minutes to closing). Real lender behavior (the surprise document request at the last possible minute). The $43 Venmo from 2022 is the kind of absurdly small + old line item that actually triggers underwriter follow-ups. Caption deadpans the absurdity instead of explaining it.
